channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Could SpaceX Join the "Magnificent Seven"?
item.description: SpaceX has quickly become a trillion-dollar company.

item.title: Will Tesla Be Acquired by SpaceX? And Does That Make Tesla Stock a Buy?
item.description: There is speculation that SpaceX will acquire Tesla within the next year.

item.title: SpaceX Can Be Added to the Russell 1000 and Russell 3000 After Today -- Don't Take the Bait
item.description: The rewriting of several major index inclusion criteria has set retail investors up to be fleeced.

item.title: The Rivian R2 Matches The Tesla Model Y On Efficiency, Despite Weighing More
item.description: Rivian’s R2 Performance is roughly 500 pounds heavier than Tesla’s go-fast crossover, yet the energy consumption is identical.

item.title: Elon Musk just upped his Tesla stake further fueling SpaceX merger conversation
item.description: Elon Musk quietly collected one of the largest single-transaction paydays in corporate history on Monday. A Form 4 filed with the SEC on June 17, 2026 disclosed that Musk exercised 303,960,630 Tesla stock options from his 2018 compensation package, with the transaction dated June 16. No shares we...

item.title: Elon Musk, The World's First Trillionaire, Holds Bitcoin And 'Some' Dogecoin — 'Let That Sink In,' Says Popular Analyst
item.description: Popular cryptocurrency analyst Ali Martinez drew attention to the fact that Elon Musk, who became the world’s first trillionaire, owns Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE). Is Musk ‘Orange-Pilled’? In an X post, Martinez paired a line drawing of Musk with the Bitcoin logo, with the c...

item.title: TSLA Stock Eyes Red Week: Elon Musk Says Tesla’s FSD Could Soon Take Directions Like An Uber Driver
item.description: The feature would allow drivers to make natural-language requests, such as "turn right here" or "drop us off here," while FSD is active.

item.title: Tesla's $25 Billion Capex Plan Is No Longer About Cars. Here's Why Tesla Could Be the Most Undervalued AI and Robotics Stock of 2026.
item.description: Tesla's embodiment of artificial intelligence (AI) makes it one of the best ways to capitalize on the revolutionary changes driven by AI development.

item.title: TSLA Stock Rises Overnight: Analyst Sees Q2 Delivery Beat, Says SPCX Merger Buzz Is Limiting Downside Risk
item.description: Wolfe expects Tesla to deliver 420,000 vehicles in Q2, above the 400,000-unit consensus.

item.title: TSLA Stock: Elon Musk Exercises 2018 Stock Options Award, Boosts Stake In EV Giant
item.description: No cash changed hands, and no shares were sold into the open market in the process, a filing shows.

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving is getting a major parking upgrade, Elon Musk says
item.description: Tesla Full Self-Driving is going to be getting a major parking upgrade. That’s according to CEO Elon Musk, who detailed a crafty new feature that will improve parking preferences, removing a layer of human input. Musk said that upcoming releases of Full Self-Driving will “remember your parking pr...

item.title: Elon Musk gets a $116 billion Tesla payday
item.description: Elon Musk has exercised the entirety of his 2018 Tesla (TSLA) CEO pay package, acquiring 303,960,630 shares for a paper gain of about $116 billion, according to a new SEC filing. But he didn’t sell a single share to do it — and the stock he received is locked up until 2028.

item.title: SpaceX vs. Tesla Stock: Which Elon Musk Company Is the Better Investment?
item.description: Both companies are led by Elon Musk, the world's first potential trillionaire, and are disrupting massive industries while creating substantial shareholder value.

item.title: Uber and Lucid team up to bring robotaxis to Houston
item.description: Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian joins the show to discuss why Uber (UBER) and Lucid (LCID) chose Houston, Texas, as their next robotaxi market, what makes the city an attractive testing ground for autonomous ride-hailing and why there's so much riding on this launch for both ...

item.title: What the SpaceX Lockup Means for the Stock
item.description: Coming into Wednesday trading, shares were up almost 50% from their $135 IPO price, valuing the company north of $2.6 trillion.

item.title: PayPal Mafia member and ex-Sequoia steward Roelof Botha joins SpaceX board—reuniting with Elon Musk after decades
item.description: Roelof Botha, who spent more than two decades at VC firm Sequoia Capital, first worked with Elon Musk at PayPal.

item.title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang Runs A $5 Trillion Giant Like It's 30 Days From Collapse. Perplexity's CEO Says That's The Secret— 'You Need To Work Forever…'
item.description: Perplexity AI co-founder and CEO Aravind Srinivas shared two key entrepreneurship lessons he learned from Nvidia Corp's CEO Jensen Huang and Tesla Inc CEO Elon Musk during an episode of the "20VC" podcast hosted by venture capitalist Harry Stebbings, released...

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving and App Connectivity save life in medical emergency
item.description: In a remarkable demonstration of how advanced vehicle technology can intersect with family care and rapid response, a Tesla Model Y equipped with Full Self-Driving (FSD) Supervised helped save a driver’s life during a severe heart attack. The incident, which occurred on November 15, 2025, highlig...

item.title: Robotaxi rankings show Waymo lead, China's rise
item.description: Waymo is the clear robotaxi leader, but if you thought Tesla and Zoox were close to catching up, think again — it's actually three Chinese companies, according to a new database shared first with Axios.

item.title: Goldman Sachs Has a Great News For Tesla Stock Fans
item.description: Tesla Gets Fresh Boost as Goldman Lifts Q2 Delivery Outlook

item.title: Elon Musk predicts Grok will start to challenge Hollywood by the end of 2026
item.description: In a bold declaration on X, xAI CEO Elon Musk announced that its model will be capable of creating full movies by the end of the year. Quoting an xAI post showcasing a stunning AI-generated trailer for Homer’s The Odyssey , Musk simply stated: “Full movies by the end of the year.” The quoted vide...

item.title: Tesla Owners Are Using Doll Heads To Fool Full Self-Driving
item.description: Is that Dwayne Johnson driving your Tesla? Nope, just his likeness being used to defeat Tesla's driver monitoring systems.

item.title: SpaceX Shares Fall for First Time Since Blockbuster Debut
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- SpaceX shares declined for the first time since its record initial public offering, snapping a three-day rally that vaulted it past Amazon.com Inc. as the world’s fifth-largest stock.Most Read from BloombergRead the 14-Point Draft Memorandum Between the US and IranModi Warns of ‘Sh...

item.title: Elon Musk Is Now Worth More Than Jeff Bezos, Sergey Brin And Larry Ellison Combined After SPCX Rally
item.description: Space Exploration Technologies Corp. and Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk‘s net worth has surpassed the $1 trillion mark.

item.title: Rivian CEO signals self-driving prices, like Tesla’s, will fall
item.description: Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe says the money automakers charge for self-driving software won’t last, comparing autonomy to airbags: a paid option today, baked into the price of every car tomorrow. The comments, made in a new interview with WIRED, amount to a quiet warning shot at Tesla, which just moved...

item.title: Tesla Defies Auto Industry Sales Slump, Goldman Raises Q2 Delivery Forecast
item.description: Goldman Sachs expects rising Tesla sales at a time when the broader auto industry is struggling. Goldman's forecast of 420,000 cars would be a 9.3% increase compared to Q2 2025, when Tesla delivered 384,122 vehicles. Sales growth of that level would buck current trends for both Tesla — which has ...

item.title: Trump’s DOJ intervenes to keep Musk’s xAI gas turbines polluting Memphis
item.description: The US Department of Justice has asked a federal court to throw out a Clean Air Act lawsuit against Elon Musk’s xAI, arguing that the company’s unpermitted gas turbines near Memphis are a matter of “national, economic, and energy security.” The move puts the Trump administration in court alongsid...

item.title: SpaceX (SPCX) Stock Gets A 1.6 Million Contract Options Debut
item.description: SpaceX, trading as NasdaqGS:SPCX, saw options on its stock launch within days of its IPO. Options trading on SPCX recorded over 1.6 million contracts on the first day. The debut ranked just behind Tesla and Nvidia for first day options volume.

item.title: Jim Cramer Remembers How He Was Criticized After Tesla, Inc. (TSLA)’s IPO
item.description: We recently published Jim Cramer Called SpaceX A Meme Stock & Discussed These 7 Stocks. Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer.

item.title: Tesla patent aims to improve common on-road complaint
item.description: Tesla is continuing to push the boundaries of vehicle dynamics, as its latest published patent, US12654505B2, or “Suspension Actuator System for a Vehicle,’ which has finally been pushed through. The design, which is credited to inventors Brian Lee Doorlag, Avraham Kagan, and Justin Sill, introdu...

item.title: Can Anysphere Buyout Drive SPCX Further After a Blockbuster IPO?
item.description: SpaceX's $60B Anysphere deal could boost its enterprise AI push after a $75B IPO, but execution risks and Cursor growth remain key tests.

item.title: Tesla needs to deliver on Robotaxi milestones for shares to find momentum: analyst
item.description: Investing.com -- Tesla is on track for a solid second quarter on deliveries and earnings, but the stock's longer-term trajectory hinges on execution in robotaxi and humanoid robotics, according to Wolfe Research.

item.title: SpaceX Stock Is Falling. The Real Test Comes When Lockups End.
item.description: Coming into Wednesday trading, shares were up almost 50% from their $135 IPO price, valuing the company north of $2.6 trillion.

item.title: Musk has made the impossible work. AI data centers in space won't be easy
item.description: Elon Musk built Tesla and SpaceX by riding cost curves down. Orbital data centers need the same collapse, but terrestrial rivals keep getting cheaper

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Down. An Argentina Charger Deal Won’t Help.
item.description: Tesla stock is down early Wednesday. The move came despite Argentina’s energy company, YPF and Tesla signing a memorandum of understanding to explore the development of a fast-charger network. “The partnership tries to leverage on YPF’s leading fuel marketing operation in Argentina, with 55% o...

item.title: Uber Robo-Taxis Move Step Closer as Self-Driving War Revs Up
item.description: On Wednesday, ride-hailing giant Uber EV maker Lucid and self-driving technology start-up Nuro announced plans to launch robo-taxis in Houston in 2027. Uber operates the network, Lucid builds the cars, and Nuro provides the autonomous driving technology. The move is yet another example that t...

item.title: Why SpaceX Is Buying Cursor
item.description: SpaceX (SPCX) has agreed to acquire Cursor, the AI coding startup, for $60 billion in stock. The deal comes days after SpaceX's record-breaking Nasdaq debut and is expected to close in the third quarter, pending regulatory approval. Cursor makes a tool that helps developers write, edit, and revie...

item.title: Tesla adds a car vacuum to a Supercharger for the first time
item.description: Tesla has installed a free car vacuum right next to the charging stalls at a Supercharger station in Germany — believed to be a first for the network. The setup lets owners clean out their cars while they charge, turning otherwise idle minutes into something useful.

item.title: SpaceX's near $3 trillion rally comes with one big catch: Chart of the Day
item.description: SpaceX is already trading like one of America's biggest companies — its profits are not.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi: The Hype Is The Real Deal, The Numbers Can Wait
2027 Porsche Taycan adds fake gear shifts so you can make your car slower
item.description: Porsche is updating its four-door electric sportscar for the 2027 model year, with a few consequential updates and one new optional feature that I still cannot fathom why anybody would want.

item.title: Tesla Cybercab gets huge nod of support from Texas DOT official
item.description: The Tesla Cybercab got a huge nod of support from a Texas Department of Transportation official, who said the all-electric ride-hailing vehicle is “a tangible example of how quickly our transportation system is evolving.” The Cybercab was present at the Texas Department of Transportation’s Texas ...

item.title: Uber and Lucid pick Houston as next robotaxi market as battle with Waymo, Tesla heats up
item.description: Uber and Lucid are expanding their robotaxi venture, naming Houston as the second planned market for the autonomous ride-hailing service the two companies are building with self-driving startup Nuro.

item.title: Uber’s Lucid-powered robotaxis are heading to Houston next
item.description: Uber , Nuro, and Lucid have picked Houston as the second city for their planned robotaxi service, with the launch in the Texas city expected in mid-2027.

item.title: Cathie Wood Swaps Tesla for SpaceX in $529M Elon Musk Pivot
item.description: ARK sold Tesla and bought $529M of SpaceX, the world's biggest IPO, the same day. The reason goes beyond Musk loyalty.

item.title: Uber Expands Robotaxi Ambitions With WeRide Zurich Launch, Stellantis-Wayve Global Partnership
item.description: The company disclosed two separate updates on Wednesday regarding its plans to scale its robotaxi services internationally.

item.title: Elon Musk's Robotaxi Goals Get A Boost As Texas DOT Official Hails Tesla Cybercab
item.description: A Texas Department of Transportation (DOT) executive has backed Tesla Inc.‘s (NASDAQ:TSLA) robotaxi efforts, in what could be a boost for Elon Musk‘s self-driving goals. A Significant Shift In Mobility Marc Williams, the Executive Director of the Texas DOT, took to the social media platform Linke...

item.title: TSLA Stock In Focus: Could Optimus Be The Missing Link Between Tesla And SpaceX?
item.description: Elon Musk has outlined a vision in which large groups of Tesla’s humanoid robots could eventually function as self-replicating machines in space.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Faces Senate Inquiry Over FSD Safety Claims In Europe Too
item.description: Two U.S. senators have requested a federal investigation into Tesla's self-published safety data for its Full Self-Driving system, questioning whether the company has overstated real-world safety performance. Regulators in Sweden and the Netherlands have also accused Tesla of providing misleading...

item.title: SpaceX Stock Will Face a Reckoning When Investor Lockups End
item.description: Coming into Wednesday trading, shares were up almost 50% from their $135 IPO price, valuing the company north of $2.6 trillion.
